# Ledger Suite LLM Context

Ledger Suite is an offline-first decision-analysis PWA focused on managerial judgment.

## Active Wedge
- Decision Memo
- Case Analysis
- Governance Review baseline scaffolding

## Implemented Core
- Workspace/case local model in IndexedDB (schema v2)
- Evidence, assumptions, options, matrix, decision, and outcome records
- Deterministic JSON snapshot export and staged import commit
- Print-safe brief generation
- Recovery flows: integrity repair, local reset, cache reset
- Service worker update detection and apply-update path

## Constraints
- No mandatory backend
- Portable artifacts
- Explicit assumptions and traceability
